name: Butterscotch Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Place popcorn and nuts in a greased large roasting pan; set aside.
3. In a heavy 3-quart saucepan, combine butterscotch morsels, corn syrup, and butter.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils.
5. Pour the butterscotch mixture over popcorn; stir to coat well.
6. Bake for 45 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Remove from oven and stir every 10 minutes until slightly cooled.
8. When cool, store in a tightly covered container. Makes about 3 1/2 quarts.
